calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-26-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840

Ryan L. Dahm, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Birite Restaurant Supply, Inc, a Corporation DBA Birite Foodservice Distributors,
No appearance by defaulted defendant Rustic Restaurants, LLC, a California Limited Liability Company DBA Rustic Restaurants and DBA Build Pizzeria Roma,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up on file.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages: $44,962.58
Pre-Judgment Interest: $4,102.56
Attorney's Fees: $1000.00
Costs: $750.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $50,815.14

Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2016 Continued To Jun-07-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Ryan Dahm, Esq. for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Jun-07-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Off Calendar Aug-17-2015 Continued To Dec-02-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY, INC'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is Granted, no opposition filed. Order signed. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
